steps.title: Write each count
steps.content: The number of 9-inch parts is $n$, the number of 8-inch parts is $4n$, and the number of 3-inch parts is $30$.

steps.title: Build the total
steps.content: The machine makes $100$ parts total, so $$4n+n+30=100$$ Combining like terms gives $$5n+30=100$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The correct answer is $5n+30=100$, so D is correct.
